description: A trading firm wants to participate in an FTR auction to hedge against congestion costs for its power plant.

nodes.task_description: Analyze historical congestion patterns and costs on the transmission path from the power plant to the main load center.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies that the path is frequently congested during summer months.

nodes.task_description: Forecast the likely clearing price for the FTR in the upcoming auction based on historical auction results.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides an estimated price for the FTR.

nodes.task_description: Develop a bidding strategy and submit a bid for the required amount of FTRs into the ISO's auction system.
